case_title: MILTON E. LEMUS VS. INMOTION TRANSPORT LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEMUS, MILTON E. AS TO DEFENDANT INMOTION TRANSPORT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
